bird.name: Mussau flycatcher
bird.summary: The Mussau flycatcher (Myiagra hebetior) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae. It is endemic to Mussau Island in the Bismarck Arc…

relations.subject: Mussau flycatcher
relations.evidence: The Mussau flycatcher is threatened by habitat loss due to logging and is considered Vulnerable by the IUCN
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Mussau flycatcher
relations.evidence: The Mussau flycatcher is threatened by habitat loss due to logging and is considered Vulnerable by the IUCN
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
